summary: Complete UI redesign testing - Bottom Tab Navigation with 5 tabs fully functional. All 10 specified features tested and passed. App loads with Home tab showing hero carousel, nearby locations, special offers and quick access. All tabs navigate correctly. Map filtering works. Favorites flow end-to-end verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 tab components (HomeTab, MapTab, EventsTab, FavoritesTab, ProfileTab) correctly use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
Tab bar testIDs added (tab-home, tab-mapa, tab-rezervacije, tab-favoriti, tab-profil) during testing for Playwright reliability
Leaflet map iFrame generates console warning 'allow-scripts and allow-same-origin sandbox' - this is informational only, not blocking
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (23 locations, events, offers, attractions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full tab-based navigation redesign tested and working. URL: https://gradacac-map.preview.emergentagent.com. 5 tabs all functional. Map shows 23 locations with category filters. Favorite flow (add/remove/persist via AsyncStorage) working correctly end-to-end.

rezervacije_tab.attractions_section: Znamenitosti - shows Gradska biblioteka and test attractions

profil_tab.branding: Gradačac Mapa + Vaš vodič kroz grad

quick_access_dogadjaji.navigates_to: Rezervacije tab - confirmed by Nadolazeći Događaji section

e2e_favorites_flow.steps: Home → click location card → fav button → back → Favoriti tab
e2e_favorites_flow.result: Restoran Stari Grad appears in Favoriti with count badge = 1
